name: Eggplant Mozzarella
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large saucepan over low heat, cook chopped green onion and mushrooms in 1/4 cup water until tender.
3. Add spaghetti sauce; bring to a boil. Reduce heat; simmer for 20 to 25 minutes.
4. Sprinkle salt over sliced eggplant; set aside to drain for about 10 minutes.
5. In a shallow bowl, beat the egg white and water together.
6. Dip each eggplant slice in the egg mixture, then into the flour.
7. Heat olive oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium heat.
8. Add eggplant slices and cook until browned, turning once; drain on paper towels.
9. Continue cooking all slices until done.
10. In a 13-inch x 9-inch casserole dish, spread about half the sauce.
11. Add a layer of eggplant, top with half the cottage cheese and more sauce.
12. Repeat layers until all ingredients are used, ending with sauce.
13. Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese on top.
14. Bake uncovered for 30 minutes. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
